---
title: "Open Questions"
sidebar: qa
---

This page tracks design questions that are not settled yet.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Should conduit remain a standalone object?

Current direction: no. Model conduit as an [Enclosure](../References/Enclosure.qmd) with `enclosure_type: conduit`, `pipe`, `duct`, `casing`, `borehole`, or `tray`.

This keeps physical containment in one resource family while still preserving material, diameter, ownership, and specification metadata for pipes and ducts.

:::
